minimised. Similarly if the signs having these asterisms are
transitted by malefics who are the owners of these signs, then
too there can be no evil effects.
Reckoning from the natal asterism, Mantreswara classi
fies all the stars to represent the whole body. He asks us to
find out the asterism through which a planet transits. If that
is a malefic transit, the part corresponding to the asterism will
be affected. Thus FOR THE SUN we get the following:-
Countingfrom the Part oft he body Effects
asterism at birth
1 Face Loss
2,3,4,5 Head Wealth
6,7,8,9 Chest Success
10 to 13 Right hand Gain
14to 19 The feet Loss
20to 23 Left hand Ill-health
24,25 The eyes Gain
26,27 The organs of Danger
procreation

106 Rectification of Birth Time
FOR THE MOON
Asterism Part of the body Result
1,2 Face Great fear
3to 6 Head Well-being
7,8 Back Victory over foes
9, 10 Eyes Financial gain
11 to 15 Chest Mental peace
16 to 18 Left hand Quarrel
